title: hieracium vellereum subsp. orteganum
intro: Hieracium vellereum subsp. orteganum, also known as Ort's hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium vellereum subsp. orteganum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant may be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
